user.title: Add ArgoCD
user.description: Choose how Home Assistant should connect to ArgoCD.

data_description.base_url: The address of your ArgoCD server, including the scheme.

data_description.token: Generate one with: argocd account generate-token

filters.title: Name & filters
filters.description: Discovered {count} application(s). Name this ArgoCD instance and optionally limit which applications are tracked. Leave the filters empty to track them all; pick from the lists or type your own.

data_description.namespace: Leave empty to read Applications across all namespaces the ServiceAccount can see.

data_description.api_url: The Kubernetes API server address, including scheme and port.
data_description.ca_cert: Paste the PEM contents, or give a file path on the Home Assistant host.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate ArgoCD
reauth_confirm.description: Your ArgoCD credentials are no longer valid. Enter a new one.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the URL and network.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your token or credentials.
error.bad_certificate: TLS certificate could not be verified. Provide a CA certificate or disable verification.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This ArgoCD instance is already configured.

data.auto_add_discovered: Automatically add newly discovered applications and clusters

data_description.auto_add_discovered: When on, entities are created automatically for applications (and clusters) that appear after setup.
data_description.enable_watch: Push application changes instantly via a watch stream instead of waiting for the next poll. The update interval becomes a periodic safety net.

sync.name: Sync application
sync.description: Trigger a sync for an ArgoCD application.

namespace.name: Namespace
namespace.description: Namespace the Application lives in (needed only to disambiguate).

prune.name: Prune
prune.description: Delete resources that are no longer defined in Git.

revision.name: Revision
revision.description: Git revision / branch / tag to sync to.

refresh.name: Refresh application
refresh.description: Ask ArgoCD to re-compare live and desired state.

namespace.name: Namespace
namespace.description: Namespace the Application lives in (needed only to disambiguate).
